<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 2:11 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
You need to create 6 files for the "Sony" brand design style in a Cursor Skill located at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\`. These files define how to generate product pages in Sony's design language.

## Source Material: Sony Design Patterns

Key characteristics from the analysis:
- **Colors**: 80%+ dark backgrounds (#000000, #1a1a1a). White (#FFFFFF) for specs/purchase areas. Light gray (#F5F5F5) for Benefits Bar. CTA buttons: black fill white text. Links: #0070D2 blue. Promo: red for "Save $XX".
- **Typography**: SST font (fallback: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif). Hero H1: 48-64px Bold. H2: 32-40px Bold. H3: 24-28px Bold. Body: 16-18px Regular. Price: 28-36px Bold. Caption/Badge: 12-14px. Stat numbers: 48-96px Bold.
- **Layout**: Marketing page + Buy page separation. Marketing: full-screen immersive sections, centered text + bottom product image. Buy: left image gallery + right purchase panel. Feature Badges horizontal scrolling bar.
- **Page structure**: Marketing page = Hero → 3D Explorer → NC deep dive → Sound deep dive → Call quality → Comfort → Connectivity → Promo Tiles. Buy page = Purchase panel → Feature Badges → Benefits Bar → Offers → About → Features → Reviews → FAQ → Footnotes.
- **Copy style**: Three-layer tech narrative: emotional hook → technical substance → quantified comparison. Heavy media quotes. Engineer testimonials with artist credits. "Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound." style headlines. Sentence-period fragments.
- **Unique elements**: Feature Badges horizontal scrollbar, media review quotes block, engineer testimonials, three-layer tech narrative, 30+ footnotes, separate marketing/buy pages.
- **CTA**: "ADD TO CART" (not Buy Now), "Learn More", "See More Features", "Where To Buy"
- **Border radius**: ~6px for buttons (not capsule like Apple/Shokz), 18px for cards
- **Section spacing**: 80-120px between sections. Max-width: ~1200px content, full-bleed images.
- **Responsive breakpoints**: @media (max-width: 1068px) tablet, @media (max-width: 734px) mobile

## Format Reference

Follow the format of the existing Shokz files. Each reference file should be self-contained markdown with:
- Clear section headers
- CSS code blocks where relevant
- HTML component snippets where relevant
- Tables for structured data
- Practical, copy-paste-ready code

## Files to Create

### 1. `references/sony-design-tokens.md`
Create a design tokens file with:
- CSS variables in `:root {}` block (colors, typography, layout, spacing, border-radius)
- Typography scale table (H1-Body-Caption-Stat with font-size, weight, line-height)
- Border radius table
- Spacing table
- Responsive breakpoint code
- Color usage rules
Key colors: --color-bg-primary: #000; --color-bg-secondary: #1a1a1a; --color-bg-light: #f5f5f5; --color-bg-white: #fff; --color-text-primary: #fff (on dark); --color-text-secondary: #999; --color-text-dark: #1a1a1a (on light); --color-accent-blue: #0070D2; --color-promo-red: #e74c3c; --color-border: #333;
Font: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif (SST fallback)
Max-width: 1200px content, section-padding: 100px 0, grid-gap: 60px

### 2. `references/sony-components.md`
Create component library with HTML+CSS snippets for:
1. Hero-Marketing (full-screen dark, centered headline + subtitle + product image)
2. Hero-Purchase (left image gallery + right purchase panel with price, color selector, ADD TO CART)
3. Feature-Badges-Bar (horizontal scrolling badges with icon + text)
4. Media-Reviews-Block (3 quote cards: "quote" — Source, Year)
5. Feature-Section-Dark (full-width dark section with centered H2 + body + product image)
6. Feature-Section-Split (50/50 left-text-right-image with dark background)
7. Tech-Three-Layer (emotional hook H2 → technical H3 + body → quantified comparison stat)
8. Engineer-Testimonial (blockquote + name + studio + artist credits list)
9. Benefits-Bar (horizontal: Easy Returns / My Sony / Free Shipping / 0% APR / 5% Back)
10. Spec-Table (key-value pairs grouped: Size & Weight / General / Battery / Bluetooth / NC)
11. Compare-Table (3-column with product images, "Learn More" CTA per column)
12. Footnotes (30+ numbered footnotes in small text)
Each with complete HTML + CSS.

### 3. `references/sony-copy-patterns.md`
Create copy patterns file covering:
- Product name format (型号 + 定位词 + 品类: "WH-1000XM6 Best Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones")
- Hero headline formulas: short-sentence-pair ("Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound."), full-caps declarations ("YOUR WORLD. NOTHING ELSE."), number+verb ("7x faster. Flawless control.")
- Three-layer tech narrative structure: Layer 1 = emotional hook / Layer 2 = technical substance / Layer 3 = quantified comparison with named predecessor
- Body text rules: second-person, verb-driven, em-dash explanations, "so" causation
- Media review quote format: "Quote." — Source, Year
- Engineer testimonial format: Name / Studio / (Artist credits) / "Quote"
- CTA wording: ADD TO CART, Learn More, See More, Where To Buy, Explore the 1000X series
- Feature Badge text examples
- Stat card display rules
- Footnote conventions (30+ numbered, each with test conditions)
- Forbidden words / tone rules
Include specific copy examples from the analysis.

### 4. `references/sony-page-structures.md`
Create page structures for TWO page types:
**A. Marketing Page (sony.com style)**:
- Hero (full-screen dark, centered title + subtitle + product image + video slideshow link)
- 3D Product Explorer (optional, XM6-level products)
- Deep-Dive sections x4-6 (NC, Sound, Calls, Comfort, Connectivity, etc.)
- Each deep-dive: H2 emotional title → H3 technical subtitle → body → optional stat/comparison
- Promo Tiles (cross-sell to series/category)
- Support links
- Footnotes
Section selection matrix by product tier.

**B. Buy Page (electronics.sony.com style)**:
- Purchase Panel (product name, price, Affirm financing, color selector, ADD TO CART)
- Tab Navigation (About / Features / Specs / Reviews / Questions / Support / Warranty)
- Feature Badges horizontal bar
- Benefits Bar
- Offers (trade-in, trials)
- About This Item (3 bullet summary)
- Features (embedded marketing content with media reviews)
- Reviews & Questions
- Return Policy
- Frequently Bought Together
- Footnotes

### 5. `assets/sony-marketing-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Dark theme dominant (80%+ dark sections)
- Placeholder content with [Image: description] and [Video: description]
- Complete responsive design (@media max-width: 1068px and 734px)
- Sections: Hero → Feature Overview → Deep-Dive NC → Deep-Dive Sound → Deep-Dive Calls → Deep-Dive Comfort → Connectivity → Promo Tiles → Footnotes
- Sony-style typography and spacing
- Media review quotes block
- Engineer testimonial
- Should be openable directly in browser

### 6. `assets/sony-buy-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Mixed light (purchase area) + dark (features) sections
- Tab navigation bar
- Left image + right purchase panel layout
- Feature Badges horizontal scrollbar
- Benefits Bar
- About section with "See More" expand
- Features section (dark, marketing content embedded)
- Spec table (key-value grouped)
- Reviews placeholder
- Footnotes (30+ numbered)
- Responsive design
- Should be openable directly in browser

IMPORTANT: Create ALL 6 files. Make them high quality and self-contained. Use forward slashes in markdown link paths.
</user_query>

input.contents:
# Sony Product Page — Copy Patterns

Sony 文案的核心张力：技术权威 × 情感叙事。用工程师的精度传递发烧友的激情。

---

## 1. 产品名规范

- **格式**：`型号 + 定位词 + 品类`
- 示例：`WH-1000XM6 Best Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones`
- H1 展示型号（`WH-1000XM6`），H2 或副标展示定位句
- 购买页 H1 用完整名：`WH-1000XM6 Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones`
- 正文首次出现用全名，后续可缩写（"the XM6" / "the headphones"）

---

## 2. Headline 公式

### 句式 A：短句对（最常用）

两个短句，句号分隔，形成语义递进。

| 示例 | 结构 |
|------|------|
| Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound. | 超越 X. 更高 Y. |
| Hear everything. Hear nothing. | 正反对立 |
| Precision crafted. Personally tuned. | 并列碎片 |
| Less noise. More life. | Less X. More Y. |
| Silence reimagined. Music redefined. | X 动词. Y 动词. |

### 句式 B：全大写宣言

用于 Hero 区或重大升级声明。全大写，3-5 词。

| 示例 |
|------|
| YOUR WORLD. NOTHING ELSE. |
| THE NEXT ERA OF SILENCE. |
| HEAR WHAT MATTERS. |

### 句式 C：数字 + 动词

用于量化对比场景。数字开头，动词驱动。

| 示例 |
|------|
| 7x faster. Flawless control. |
| 40 hours. Zero compromises. |
| 8 microphones. One perfect silence. |

### 写法规则

1. **2-5 词为一个碎片**，句号分隔
2. 全大写仅限 Hero 区主标语，其他区用 Title Case 或 Sentence case
3. 不用感叹号（Apple 规则同样适用）
4. 不用问号（Sony 是宣言式，不是对话式）
5. Hero 区可放视频链接（"▶ Watch the video"），但不放 ADD TO CART

---

## 3. 三层技术叙事结构

Sony 特有的递进叙事模式。每个 Deep-Dive section 使用此结构。

### Layer 1 — 情感钩子（Emotional Hook）

H2 级别，2-6 词，诗意 + 情感。不含技术术语。

> "Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound."
> "Sound that moves you."
> "Silence the world around you."

### Layer 2 — 技术实质（Technical Substance）

H3 级别 + 正文段落。点名具体技术、组件、芯片、算法。

> **Integrated Processor V2**
>
> The all-new V2 chip processes noise-canceling signals independently
> from audio playback — delivering simultaneous precision for both.
> Eight beam-forming microphones create a detailed sound map of your
> environment, adapting 700 times per second.

### Layer 3 — 量化对比（Quantified Comparison）

大数字 + 命名前代产品作为对比基准。

> **7x** faster ambient sound sensing than WH-1000XM5¹

### 三层示例（完整）

```
[Layer 1] Silence the world around you.
[Layer 2] Auto NC Optimizer / Eight microphones sense ambient noise
          and adjust canceling in real time — adapting to altitude,
          atmospheric pressure, and even the shape of your ears.
[Layer 3] 7x faster processing vs. WH-1000XM5¹
```

---

## 4. 正文规则

每段 2-4 句，15-30 词/句。

### 结构

| 句序 | 作用 | 样本 |
|------|------|------|
| 句1 | 技术陈述（what） | "A newly developed 40mm driver with a rigid dome and soft edge delivers ultra-low distortion." |
| 句2 | 用户价值（so what） | "You hear every note exactly as the artist intended — from the deepest bass to the most delicate highs." |
| 句3 | 量化对比（vs. what） | "That's a 25% wider frequency response compared to the XM5."¹ |

### 正文写法

1. **第二人称**："you hear" / "your music" / "you're in control"
2. **动词驱动**：主动语态，"delivers" / "adapts" / "senses" 而非 "is delivered"
3. **em dash（—）解释**："powered by the V2 chip — Sony's most advanced audio processor"
4. **"so" 因果连接**："…so you hear every note" / "…so silence stays consistent"
5. **量化声明必带基准和脚注**："7x faster than WH-1000XM5¹"——绝不孤立放数字
6. **正文 max-width 约 800px**

---

## 5. 媒体评价格式

### 引用格式

```
"[Quote sentence.]" — [Source], [Year]
```

### 示例

> "The best noise-canceling headphones money can buy — and it's not even close." — The Verge, 2026
>
> "Sony has done it again. The XM6 sets a new standard for wireless audio." — CNET, 2026
>
> "Transcendent sound quality with noise canceling that borders on supernatural." — What Hi-Fi?, 2026

### 规则

- 引号包裹完整句子，句号在引号内
- 来源用斜体 cite 标签
- 年份必须标注
- 固定 3 条评价并列

---

## 6. 工程师证言格式

### 结构

```
"[Quote — first person, 1-3 sentences]"
[Name]
[Title], [Division]
Trusted by: [Artist 1] / [Artist 2] / [Studio Name]
```

### 示例

> "We didn't just want to cancel noise — we wanted to create a space where nothing exists between you and the music."
>
> **Takeshi Nakamura**
> Senior Acoustic Engineer, Sony Audio Division
>
> *Trusted by: Mark Ronson / Jacob Collier / Sony Music Studios Tokyo*

### 规则

- 第一人称，展现工程师视角
- 姓名粗体，职称正常字重
- 艺术家致谢列表用 "/" 分隔
- 每页最多 1-2 条工程师证言

---

## 7. CTA 文案

| 类型 | 文案 | 样式 | 使用场景 |
|------|------|------|----------|
| Primary | ADD TO CART | 黑底白字矩形按钮（6px radius） | 购买页购买面板 |
| Secondary | Learn More | 蓝色文字链 | 营销页特性区 |
| Explore | See More Features | 蓝色文字链 | 购买页 About section |
| Location | Where To Buy | 蓝色文字链 | 购买面板下方 |
| Series | Explore the 1000X series | 蓝色文字链 | 促销区/页面底部 |

### 规则

- ADD TO CART 全大写（Sony 购买按钮的标准样式）
- 其他 CTA 用 Title Case（"Learn More" 非 "learn more"）
- 不用 "Buy Now"（Sony 用 ADD TO CART）
- 不用 "Shop"（那是 Apple 用语）

---

## 8. Feature Badge 文案示例

购买页顶部横滑功能徽章的文案模式：

| Badge 文案 | 结构 |
|------------|------|
| Industry-leading NC | 定位词 + 功能缩写 |
| LDAC Hi-Res Audio | 协议名 + 品质词 |
| 40hr Battery | 数字 + 功能 |
| Crystal Clear Calls | 形容词 + 功能 |
| Multipoint Connect | 功能名 |
| V2 Processor | 芯片代号 |
| Adaptive Sound Control | 功能全名 |
| 360 Reality Audio | 品牌技术名 |

---

## 9. Stat Card 显示规则

| 元素 | 规则 | 示例 |
|------|------|------|
| 数字 | 48-96px Bold，纯数字或数字+单位 | `7x` / `40hrs` / `25%` |
| 单位 | 与数字同行，0.4em 缩小 | `hrs` / `min` / `dB` |
| 说明 | 数字下方 16px，含对比基准 + 脚注 | "faster than WH-1000XM5¹" |
| 布局 | 居中排列，单个或 2-3 并列 | — |

---

## 10. 脚注规范

- **标记**：上标数字（¹²³）
- **字号**：11px，颜色 #666
- **位置**：页面最底部集中排列
- **数量**：30+ 条（Sony 脚注密度远高于其他品牌）
- **内容模板**：每条含测试条件、对比基准、法律声明

### 脚注示例

> ¹ Battery life measured with NC on, AAC codec, DSEE off, at moderate volume. Actual results may vary depending on content played and usage conditions.
>
> ² Compared to WH-1000XM5. Based on internal Sony testing conducted in February 2026 with pre-production units.
>
> ³ LDAC requires compatible source device. 990 kbps transmission requires LDAC-compatible device and wired or wireless connection that supports the bitrate.

---

## 11. 措辞禁区

| 禁用 | 替代 |
|------|------|
| revolutionary | all-new / next-generation / reimagined |
| best-in-class（无出处） | industry-leading（需脚注支撑） |
| cheap / affordable | value / accessible |
| amazing / incredible | — （直接删除，用数据代替） |
| we / our（营销正文中） | Sony / the [product] / your [experience]（工程师证言除外） |
| Buy Now | ADD TO CART |
| Shop | — （Sony 不使用此词） |
| ! （感叹号） | — （全站零感叹号） |

---

## 12. 语调对比：Sony vs. Apple

| 维度 | Sony | Apple |
|------|------|-------|
| 技术深度 | 点名芯片型号、算法名称、工程参数 | 用诗意比喻包装技术 |
| 叙事角色 | 工程师视角 + 第三方权威 | 品牌上帝视角 |
| 量化方式 | 命名前代产品 + 倍数对比 | "up to X more than previous" |
| 文字游戏 | 少——靠句式节奏而非双关 | 多——双关/押韵/文化引用 |
| 媒体引用 | 重度使用，3 条并列 | 极少，偶尔 1 条 |
| 脚注密度 | 30+，每条含完整测试条件 | 5-10 条 |

# Sony Product Page — Page Structures

两类页面模板：营销页（sony.com 沉浸式长卷轴）和购买页（electronics.sony.com 转化导向）。

---

## A. 营销页（sony.com 风格）— 沉浸式技术叙事

80%+ 深色背景，全屏 section 垂直滚动，三层技术叙事递进。

### 完整区块序列

| 序号 | 区块 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 1 | **Hero** | 全屏深色：型号(H1) + 定位句 + 主标语(H2) + 产品图 + 视频幻灯链接 |
| 2 | **3D Product Explorer**（可选） | 360° 交互产品查看器，仅旗舰产品使用 |
| 3 | **Deep-Dive: Noise Canceling** | 三层叙事：情感标题 → 技术说明 → 量化对比（7x faster） |
| 4 | **Deep-Dive: Sound Quality** | 三层叙事：音质标题 → 驱动单元/编解码 → 频响对比 |
| 5 | **Deep-Dive: Call Quality** | 三层叙事：通话标题 → 麦克风阵列 → 降噪对比 |
| 6 | **Deep-Dive: Comfort & Design** | 三层叙事：舒适标题 → 材质/重量 → 佩戴时间对比 |
| 7 | **Deep-Dive: Connectivity** | 三层叙事：连接标题 → 蓝牙/多点/编解码 → 延迟对比 |
| 8 | **Media Reviews Block** | 3 列媒体评价卡片 |
| 9 | **Engineer Testimonial** | 工程师引言 + 姓名/职称 + 艺术家信用列表 |
| 10 | **Promo Tiles** | 系列交叉推广（Explore the 1000X series / See all headphones） |
| 11 | **Support Links** | 帮助/保修/联系链接 |
| 12 | **Footnotes** | 30+ 编号脚注，含完整测试条件 |

### Deep-Dive Section 内部结构

每个 Deep-Dive 使用三层技术叙事：

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Layer 1] H2: 情感钩子（2-6 词）                │
│  "Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound."             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [Layer 2] H3: 技术名称                          │
│  正文 2-3 段：具体技术 + 用户价值                  │
│  可选子特性：H4 + 短段落                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [Layer 3] Stat Card: 大数字 + 对比基准            │
│  "7x faster ambient sensing vs. XM5¹"           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [可选] 产品细节图 / 产品完整图                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Deep-Dive 展示模式

**模式 A — 居中全宽**
- 居中 H2 + 居中正文 + 底部产品图
- 用于 NC、Sound Quality 等核心卖点

**模式 B — 50/50 分割**
- 左文右图或右文左图，深色背景
- 用于 Comfort、Connectivity 等配套卖点

**模式 C — 数据大字报**
- 超大数字居中排列（48-96px）
- 用于电池、性能量化数据

### 背景规则

- 营销页 80%+ section 使用深色背景（`#000` 或 `#1a1a1a`）
- **不做**深浅交替（这是 Apple 风格）
- `#000` 和 `#1a1a1a` 交替使用制造微妙层次感
- 仅 Benefits Bar 和 Footnotes 使用浅色背景

### 产品层级 → Section 数量

| 层级 | 示例 | Deep-Dive sections | 是否含 3D Explorer |
|------|------|-------|--------|
| 旗舰 | WH-1000XM6 | 5-6 | 是 |
| 高端 | WH-1000XM5 | 4-5 | 否 |
| 标准 | WH-CH720N | 3-4 | 否 |

---

## B. 购买页（electronics.sony.com 风格）— 转化导向

混合背景：购买面板白色 + Features 区深色。Tab 导航切换内容。

### 完整区块序列

| 序号 | 区块 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 1 | **Purchase Panel** | 左图片 gallery + 右购买信息（型号、评分、价格、Affirm、色选、ADD TO CART） |
| 2 | **Tab Navigation** | 粘性导航条：About / Features / Specs / Reviews / Questions / Support / Warranty |
| 3 | **Feature Badges Bar** | 横滑功能徽章（6-8 个，icon + text） |
| 4 | **Benefits Bar** | 水平服务条（Easy Returns / My Sony / Free Shipping / 0% APR / 5% Back） |
| 5 | **Offers** | Trade-in 优惠 / 订阅试用（Spotify / Tidal 3-month free trial） |
| 6 | **About This Item** | 3 条核心卖点 bullet summary + "See More" 展开 |
| 7 | **Features（深色区）** | 嵌入营销内容：三层叙事 + 媒体评价 + 产品图（深色背景） |
| 8 | **Specifications** | 分组 key-value 表（Size & Weight / General / Battery / Bluetooth / NC） |
| 9 | **Reviews & Questions** | 评分摘要 + 评论列表 + Q&A |
| 10 | **Return Policy** | 退货政策摘要 |
| 11 | **Frequently Bought Together** | 交叉推销配件（充电盒/耳垫/线缆） |
| 12 | **Compare Models** | 3 列对比表（产品图 + 关键参数 + Learn More） |
| 13 | **Footnotes** | 30+ 编号脚注 |

### Purchase Panel 结构

```
┌────────────────────────┬────────────────────────┐
│  [Main Product Image]  │  H1: 产品完整名称        │
│                        │  Model: WH1000XM6/B     │
│  [Thumb] [Thumb]       │  ★★★★★ 4.8 (2,847)     │
│  [Thumb] [Thumb]       │                          │
│                        │  $399.99  Save $50       │
│                        │  Starting at $34/mo      │
│                        │  with Affirm             │
│                        │                          │
│                        │  Color: ● ● ●            │
│                        │                          │
│                        │  [ADD TO CART]            │
│                        │  Where To Buy             │
└────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┘
```

### Tab Navigation

```
About | Features | Specs | Reviews | Questions | Support | Warranty
──────┼──────────┼───────┼─────────┼───────────┼─────────┼─────────
```

- 粘性定位（`position: sticky; top: 0`）
- 当前 tab 下划线高亮
- 点击锚点滚动到对应 section

### Features 区（深色嵌入）

购买页中的 Features section 使用深色背景，嵌入营销页风格的内容：
- 三层技术叙事（精简版，2-3 个 deep-dive）
- 媒体评价 block
- 产品特写图

这是 Sony 购买页的特色——在购买流中嵌入沉浸式营销叙事。

### About This Item 结构

```
About This Item

• [Core benefit 1 — 1 sentence]
• [Core benefit 2 — 1 sentence]
• [Core benefit 3 — 1 sentence]

[See More]  ← 展开显示完整描述（5-8 句）
```

---

## C. 两类页面关键差异

| 维度 | 营销页 (sony.com) | 购买页 (electronics.sony.com) |
|------|--------|--------|
| 核心功能 | 品牌叙事 + 技术深度 | 快速决策 + 转化 |
| Hero | 全屏深色 + 主标语 + 产品图，无购买按钮 | 白色背景 + 图片 gallery + 购买面板 |
| 背景节奏 | 80%+ 深色（#000 / #1a1a1a 交替） | 混合：白色(购买) + 深色(Features) |
| CTA | "Learn More" 文字链 | "ADD TO CART" 黑底按钮 |
| 导航 | 无 tab，纯滚动 | Tab 粘性导航 |
| 技术深度 | 每个卖点独立 section（5-6 个） | Features 区嵌入 2-3 个精简版 |
| 定价信息 | 无 | 价格 + Affirm 分期 + 促销红字 |
| 媒体引用 | 独立 section，3 列 | 嵌入 Features 区 |
| 工程师证言 | 独立 section | 无 |
| 脚注 | 30+ 条 | 30+ 条 |
| 篇幅 | 长（10-14 screens） | 中长（8-12 screens） |

---

## D. Section 选择矩阵

根据产品层级和页面类型选择 section 组合：

### 营销页

| Section | 旗舰 | 高端 | 标准 |
|---------|------|------|------|
| Hero | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 3D Explorer | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Deep-Dive: NC | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Deep-Dive: Sound | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Deep-Dive: Calls | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Deep-Dive: Comfort | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Deep-Dive: Connectivity | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Media Reviews | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Engineer Testimonial | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Promo Tiles | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Footnotes | ✅ 30+ | ✅ 20+ | ✅ 10+ |

### 购买页

| Section | 旗舰 | 高端 | 标准 |
|---------|------|------|------|
| Purchase Panel | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Tab Navigation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Feature Badges | ✅ 8个 | ✅ 6个 | ✅ 4个 |
| Benefits Bar | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Offers | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| About This Item | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Features (dark) | ✅ 3个deep-dive | ✅ 2个 | ✅ 1个 |
| Specifications | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Reviews | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Compare Models | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Footnotes | ✅ 30+ | ✅ 20+ | ✅ 10+ |
